creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Boris Korzun from comment #33)
> Switch to GO_MODULE
This silly GO_MODULE thing only makes dependency tracking less transparent (see comment #9), and that was never fully answered.  GitHub throttling mentioned by Guido is not an issue for consumers/builders, only for the port updaters, but we know how to deal with it.

> While 1.97 is no longer supported yet.
It was supported until very recently, but indeed, today the least supported LTS branch is v1.102.x, so I guess that's what we should be targeting now.
